(15) IntTRSNonPeriodicNontermProof (COMPLETE)
Normalized system to the following form:
f(pc, v1218:0:0, v1219:0:0, v1238:0:0) -> f(1, v1218:0:0, v1219:0:0, 1 + v1238:0:0) :|: pc = 1 && (v1238:0:0 > 0 && v1219:0:0 + 4 * v1238:0:0 > 4 && v1218:0:0 + 4 * v1238:0:0 > 4)
Proved unsatisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is never left after entering:
(((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((run1_2 * 1)) and run2_3 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_3 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((((run1_3 * 1)) > 0 and ((run1_2 * 1) + (run1_3 * 4)) > ((1 * 4))) and ((run1_1 * 1) + (run1_3 * 4)) > ((1 * 4))))) and !(((run2_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((((run2_3 * 1)) > 0 and ((run2_2 * 1) + (run2_3 * 4)) > ((1 * 4))) and ((run2_1 * 1) + (run2_3 * 4)) > ((1 * 4)))))
Proved satisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is entered at least once:
((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((run1_2 * 1)) and run2_3 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_3 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((((run1_3 * 1)) > 0 and ((run1_2 * 1) + (run1_3 * 4)) > ((1 * 4))) and ((run1_1 * 1) + (run1_3 * 4)) > ((1 * 4)))))

(28) IntTRSNonPeriodicNontermProof (COMPLETE)
Normalized system to the following form:
f(pc, x, x1) -> f(1, x, 1 + x1) :|: pc = 1 && x < 1 + x1
Proved unsatisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is never left after entering:
(((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((run1_1 * 1)) < ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1)))) and !(((run2_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((run2_1 * 1)) < ((1 * 1) + (run2_2 * 1))))
Proved satisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is entered at least once:
((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and ((run1_1 * 1)) < ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))))
